name: Mst77Y_chrY
description: Drosophila Y-chromosome fertility factor: Mst77Y — Y-linked Mst77 paralog (autosomal Mst77F duplicated to Y); spermatid chromatin protein. Y-linked genes show retroposition signatures from autosomal ancestors; most cluster in the ~3.5 Mb assembled portion of chrY. Highly testis-restricted expression.
